strengths: Extraordinarily high predictive power with an aggregate Win Rate of 91.8% over a very large sample of 34,575 trades, indicating a statistically robust effect.
The signal demonstrates persistence, maintaining a WR well above 90% even when the prediction horizon was extended from 5 ticks (parent spec WR of 95.0%) to 20 ticks.
Highly profitable with a strong and positive aggregate expectancy of +6.53 bps per trade.
Performance is particularly strong on symbol 000660, with an average WR of 94.6% and expectancy of +9.72 bps.
weaknesses: Signal performance shows symbol-dependency, with the average WR for 000660 (94.6%) being 4.1 percentage points higher than for 005930 (90.5%).
An aggregate Win Rate of 91.8% remains anomalously high, suggesting the backtest environment may be idealized and not fully account for real-world frictions like latency or fees.
There is a predictable signal decay from 95.0% WR at a 5-tick horizon to 91.8% at 20 ticks, which should be considered for practical applications.
recommended_direction_reasoning: The spec confirms a powerful candidate edge with a 91.8% WR over 34,575 trades and a +6.53 bps expectancy. While performance is slightly mixed across symbols, the signal is overwhelmingly positive. Tightening the threshold from 0.75 to an even more extreme level (e.g., 0.85) is the logical next step to isolate the highest-conviction trades and assess if the WR can be pushed even higher, at the cost of trade frequency.
